tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search for Amazon products by keyword, ASIN, or Amazon URL with optional filters for brand, category, price range, stock status, and sorting. Returns product IDs for use with other tools. Rate limited to 20 req/min without an API key — use the register_api_key tool for 120 req/min.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get detailed product information by product_id. Returns full product details including current price and affiliate buy link.

tools.name: get_price_history
tools.description: Get price history for a product by product_id. Returns daily prices for up to 90 days.

tools.name: get_price_drops
tools.description: Get Amazon products with recent significant price drops. Returns products sorted by drop percentage.

tools.name: browse_by_category
tools.description: Browse Amazon products by category. Omit category to list all available categories. Provide a category name to get products in that category.

tools.name: browse_by_brand
tools.description: Browse Amazon products by brand name. Returns products matching the given brand.

tools.name: get_price_statistics
tools.description: Get price statistics for a product (all-time high/low, mean, median, histogram). Uses cached data for performance.

tools.name: get_price_forecast
tools.description: Get a 30-day price forecast for a product. Requires sufficient price history. Returns predicted prices with confidence scores.

tools.name: create_price_alert
tools.description: Create a price drop alert. You'll receive an email when the product drops to or below your target price.

tools.name: create_in_stock_alert
tools.description: Create a back-in-stock alert. You'll receive an email when the product becomes available again.

tools.name: get_similar_products
tools.description: Find products similar to a given product. Useful for discovering alternatives or related items.

tools.name: register_api_key
tools.description: Register for a free API key to increase your rate limits from 20/min to 120/min. An API key will be emailed to you.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "search_products" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Search for Amazon products by keyword, ASIN, or Amazon URL with optional filters for brand, category, price range, stock status, and sorting. Returns product ID…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_products, create_price_alert, create_in_stock_alert · Private data: search_products, register_api_key · Public sink: create_price_alert, create_in_stock_alert · Destructive: get_price_drops, create_price_alert.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_products, create_price_alert, create_in_stock_alert · Private data: search_products, register_api_key · Public sink: create_price_alert, create_in_stock_alert · Destructive: get_price_drops, create_price_alert

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
